input.testCaseTitle: Email is not sending to ProductHeadIndustrial and ProductHeadRetila in Product Workflow
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-249 reported defect: Email is not sending to ProductHeadIndustrial and ProductHeadRetila in Product Workflow

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: Product Workflow email routing did not send messages to Product Head Industrial and Product Head Retail. The role-recipient email logic was fixed and verified by received-mail screenshots in Dev.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.76. auth-permissions is acceptable because recipients are role-specific.
